summary: The video captures a sequence of frames from a dashcam recording a vehicle traveling along a suburban street. The road is lined with trees and buildings, and there are multiple cars ahead. As the vehicle progresses, it encounters a parked car on the right side of the road, which appears to be obstructing the lane.

events_timeline.event: A black sedan drives forward on a two-lane road, passing by several other vehicles.

uncertainties: Whether the parked car constitutes a hazard is unclear due to its position relative to the moving vehicle.

risk_assessment.why: While the parked car may pose a potential hazard, there is no direct indication of imminent collision or severe disruption to traffic flow.
